'''fagoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oose|oose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oose|oose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fagoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fægeseth|fægeseth]] || [[word:fægesej|fægesej]] || [[word:fægesesh|fægesesh]] || [[word:fægese|fægese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagogosoth|fagogosoth]] || [[word:fagogosoj|fagogosoj]] || [[word:fagogososh|fagogososh]] || [[word:fagogoso|fagogoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagosoth|fagosoth]] || [[word:fagosoj|fagosoj]] || [[word:fagososh|fagososh]] || [[word:fagoso|fagoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagofsoth|fagofsoth]] || [[word:fagofsoj|fagofsoj]] || [[word:fagofsosh|fagofsosh]] || [[word:fagofsof|fagofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fagosotho|fagosotho]] || [[word:fagosojo|fagosojo]] || [[word:fagososho|fagososho]] || [[word:fagosoko|fagosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fagosoth|fagosoth]] || [[word:fagosoj|fagosoj]] || [[word:fagososh|fagososh]] || [[word:fagoso|fagoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fagosothol|fagosothol]] || [[word:fagosojol|fagosojol]] || [[word:fagososhol|fagososhol]] || [[word:fagosokol|fagosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fagosothotho|fagosothotho]] || [[word:fagosojojo|fagosojojo]] || [[word:fagososhosho|fagososhosho]] || [[word:fagosoko|fagosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fagosothon|fagosothon]] || [[word:fagosojon|fagosojon]] || [[word:fagososhon|fagososhon]] || [[word:fagosokon|fagosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fagosothoro|fagosothoro]] || [[word:fagosojoro|fagosojoro]] || [[word:fagososhoro|fagososhoro]] || [[word:fagosokoro|fagosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
